findings.location: s1 — 基本的な記述方法 section
findings.description: The fundamental `execute()` call (no arguments) pattern from the source's '基本的な記述方法' section is entirely absent. The source shows this as the primary basic usage: `execute()` runs all batch rows listed in the current sheet. The knowledge file only shows `execute("シート名")` (multi-sheet variant), omitting the more basic single-sheet invocation. This distinction is decision-necessary for users choosing between the two approaches.
findings.source_evidence: Source 基本的な記述方法: `@Test public void testSuccess() { execute(); }` followed by a testSuccessシート with three batch rows (fileInputBatch, userDeleteBatch, fileOutputBatch) — demonstrating that a single `execute()` call processes all rows in the sheet.

findings.location: s2 — 1シートに複数ケースを含める場合 table
findings.description: The `expectedFile` column is present in the source table header for the multi-case example but is absent from the knowledge file's reproduced table. Even though all data rows in the source have blank values for this column, the column definition is part of the schema.
findings.source_evidence: Source table header: `no | description | expectedStatusCode | setUpTable | setUpFile | expectedTable | expectedFile | requestPath`. Knowledge file table header omits `expectedFile`.

findings.location: index — s1 title and section mapping
findings.description: The source has 4 distinct H2 sections (テストケース分割方針, 基本的な記述方法, 1テストケースを複数シートを分割する場合, 1シートに複数ケースを含める場合), but the knowledge file collapses them into 2 sections. Additionally, the s1 index title '複雑なテストケースの場合' is a H3 sub-heading from the source, not an accurate label for s1 which actually covers the intro, test class rules, basic method, and multi-sheet splitting — a much broader scope.
findings.source_evidence: Source H2 headings: テストケース分割方針 / 基本的な記述方法 / 1テストケースを複数シートを分割する場合 / 1シートに複数ケースを含める場合. '複雑なテストケースの場合' is an H3 under テストケース分割方針.
